name: Acute Senses
description: The vampire can see, smell, and hear at twice the distance and accuracy of a mortal, and can perfectly identify any sensory stimulus experienced before.
roll info: Add her Blood Potency to any roll to use her senses. This includes any rolls to remember and identify sensory details.
drawback: Her senses sometimes overwhelm her. Any time you roll an exceptional success on a roll relating to her senses, she gains the Obsession Condition for the stimulus for a number of nights equal to your successes.

name: Eidetic Memory
description: Your character has a photographic memory, allowing them to recall information and sensory details perfectly.
roll info: None

name: Resources
description: Reflects your character's disposable income, ranging from a little spending money to filthy rich.
roll info: Once per chapter, your character can procure an item at her Resources level or lower without issue. An item one Availability level above reduces her effective Resources by one dot for a month.

name: Trained Observer
description: Your character has spent years in the field, catching tiny details and digging for secrets. She has a better chance of finding important things.
roll info: Any time you make a Perception roll (usually Wits + Composure), you benefit from the 9-again quality. With the three-dot version, you get 8-again.

name: Group Touchstone
description: Every member of the coterie gains a communal Touchstone.
prerequisites: Each member must acquire at least one dot in this Merit.
roll info: Conveys three additional dice on detachment rolls and regains Willpower when defended.

name: Beneath Notice
description: The character appears lowly born and passes among the powerful without notice.
roll info: +3 bonus dice to Wits + Composure rolls to eavesdrop on social betters.

name: Blood Station
description: The quality of a vampire's mortal blood gives them standing in the All Night Society.
roll info: Adds its rating in dice to Ego rolls during Lingua Bellum.

name: Divine Scion
description: The true divinity of her bloodline shines through, granting access to elite places.
roll info: Adds +1 die to all Social rolls involving interactions with those beneath her. At 3 dots, grants access to elite places as Status once per story.

name: The Superior Beast
description: The Beast demonstrates the superiority of its bloodline during social encounters.
roll info: Add Blood Potency rating in bonus dice to any Maneuver roll once per scene.
drawback: After taking advantage of the superior Beast, she must test for frenzy at the end of the social encounter.

name: Adapted Feeding
description: The Beast adapts to scarcity, allowing animals to sustain the vampire even at higher Blood Potencies.
roll info: None

name: Hidden Cache
description: The character has stashed away essential supplies in hidden places.
roll info: Grants equivalent Resources in medicine or weapons once per chapter.

name: Strain Resistant
description: The character is resistant to contracting illnesses from tainted blood.
roll info: Ignores first failure for blood illness and takes one fewer level of lethal damage on a dramatic failure.

name: Unassuming Guise
description: The character fades into the background and passes as merely human.
roll info: +3 bonus dice to Social rolls to present as unassuming.

name: Friends in Low Places
description: Connected to the dregs of society, providing safe havens and information without formal authority.
roll info: Can be used to block another character's Merit usage.

name: Moonlighting
description: The character makes a little scratch on the side, often illegally.
roll info: Gains two dots of Resources once per story from a side hustle.

name: Impatient Blood
description: The vampire's blood yearns to spread, reducing the time required for serum to take hold.
roll info: None
drawback: Characters with this Merit feel compelled to procreate, regardless of with whom they may be sharing their gifts.

name: Money Talks
description: The vampire leverages economic might over an opponent during Lingua Bellum.
roll info: Add dots of Wealth Immeasurable to any Maneuver roll once per scene.

name: Wealth Immeasurable
description: Planetary scale wealth affording items up to weapons of mass destruction.
roll info: None

name: Beating the Drum
description: Stokes the Beast to bolster the might of social attacks.
roll info: Gain Danse Macabre or The Edge Conditions until end of clash.
drawback: Must test for frenzy at the end of the scene after gaining the benefits.

name: Night Guardian
description: A community has claimed the vampire as their personal monster and protector.
roll info: Use dots as equivalent in Contacts, Resources, or Status with the community once per story.

name: Flawless Timing
description: Leaps into Lingua Bellum with perfectly timed statements.
roll info: Set Timing to one above the highest rolled value once per chapter.

name: Tutelage
description: Allows experience sharing between a student and a teacher.
roll info: Gain 1 Experience or reduce next Experience purchase by 1 once per story.

name: Alley Cat
description: The Carthian moves through city streets unimpeded.
prerequisites: Athletics 2, Stealth 2, Streetwise 2, Carthian Movement Status.
roll info: Three or four successes trigger an exceptional success on navigating or hiding rolls in the home city.

name: Army of One
description: A ranking member of the Carthian Movement can summon allied backup.
roll info: Roll Presence + Politics + Carthian Status to summon one backup per dot.
drawback: For each Carthian Backup that meets torpor or Final Death, the character loses a dot of Army of One.

name: Fucking Thief
description: Steals the secrets and mystical advantages of other organizations.
roll info: Any failures with the stolen covenant knowledge are automatically dramatic failures.
drawback: This Merit functionally adds one Experience to the cost. The dot of covenant advantage cannot be used as a prerequisite for another purchased Merit or ability.

name: Jack-Booted Thug
description: A loose cannon whose menace diffuses political action.
roll info: Presence + Intimidation + City Status; opponents suffer City Status as a penalty to act against them.
drawback: Physical violence from the Thug or any of her protected Carthians ends its effects immediately.

name: Chorister
description: Allowed into Circle of the Crone rituals without being a formal member.
prerequisites: Not a member of the Circle of the Crone.
roll info: +1 bonus to Social interactions with Circle of the Crone members.

name: Mandragora Garden
description: Maintains a garden of ghouled plants that vector the vampire's Cruac.
prerequisites: Safe Place (same level), Cruac, Circle of the Crone Status.
roll info: None

name: Crowdsourcing
description: Acts as a hub to transfer Invictus resources between members.
roll info: Manipulation + Academics roll; each success transfers one Merit dot.

name: Prestigious Sire
description: Speaks with the weight of an iconic sire's reputation.
roll info: Add sire's Status Merit dots to Social dice pool instead of own.
drawback: If she fails in the action, she loses this Merit and may not repurchase it during the same story.

name: Sorcerous Eunuch
description: Subject to terrifying rituals granting near-immunity to blood sorcery.
roll info: Dice pools for magical effects targeting the character suffer his Resolve as a penalty.
drawback: Can never learn Theban Sorcery, Cruac, or any other blood sorceries.

name: Stigmata
description: Bleeds holy, fiery blood from Christ-like wounds.
prerequisites: Humanity 3+ higher than Merit or mortal, Lancea et Sanctum Status.
roll info: Receives the 8-again quality on next Theban Sorcery ritual; imparts Raptured to feeders.
drawback: Loses one Vitae per dot each week, accompanied by a single level of lethal damage.

name: Automatic Writing
description: Trance state allowing ghosts to write clues through the mortal.
roll info: Wits + Composure to enter trance; successes equal clues written.
drawback: If the roll fails, or no personal item is used, haunted for a week (failures are dramatic).

name: Laying on Hands
description: A wholesome force that heals the sick and mends injuries.
roll info: Spend a Willpower and roll Presence + Empathy. Each success heals 2 bashing or 1 lethal damage.
drawback: For every two points of damage healed (rounded up), your character suffers a single point of the same type of damage.

name: Numbing Touch
description: Psychically shuts down neurons to render subjects sluggish.
roll info: Intelligence + Empathy + Merit vs Stamina + Blood Potency; inflicts penalty to dexterity/sensory pools.

name: Around the Block
description: The elder considers nothing completely out of her experience.
prerequisites: At least one Skill at 5 or higher, Elder.
roll info: Negates the untrained penalty for all Skills.

name: Beloved
description: A mortal Touchstone keeps the elder grounded in reality.
roll info: Gain an extra bonus die on detachment rolls if an hour was spent with them.
drawback: Should her beloved die, you must immediately make a detachment roll to avoid Humanity loss.

name: Heart of Stone
description: Invests emotions into a lasting institution instead of a person.
roll info: Detachment penalty for losing all Touchstones is only -1, maximum bonus is +2.
drawback: Does not exempt your character from the Languid Condition if applicable.

name: Majordomo
description: Owns an establishment where Kindred meet safely.
roll info: +2 bonus die on Persuasion, Intimidation, and Socialize vs Kindred.
drawback: Suffers a -2 penalty on aforementioned rolls if any Kindred gets hurt under her watch until reparations are made.

name: Mentor in Immortality
description: Guides younger Kindred and calls in favors.
roll info: None
drawback: Your student is a weakness for your enemies to exploit; the Storyteller can put them in danger.

name: Prima Donna
description: Turns back on covenants to revel in personal power.
roll info: Spend Willpower to treat Status one dot higher, end conditions, or ignore soft leverage.
drawback: If you purchase any Covenant Status, you lose Prima Donna.

name: Oath of Dynasty
description: Mystical bond sharing social resources among a cyclical dynasty.
roll info: Share Social Merits. Rouse torpid members with a Blood Potency roll.
drawback: Revoking the Oath loses this Merit, and all involved characters gain the Spooked Condition.

name: Psychognosis
description: Devours human dreams to boost disciplines via pseudo-science.
prerequisites: Icelus, Psychology Specialty in Medicine, Auspex, Dominate.
roll info: Enhances Auspex and Dominate.
drawback: Used too many times in a row, the victim will suffer hallucinations and lost time, or even death.

name: Blood Chymistry
description: Prepares alchemical potions using Vitae and Pyros.
prerequisites: Resources 3, Safe Place 2, Alchemy Specialty in Science.
roll info: Roll Intelligence + Science minus rating to prepare procedures.
drawback: Subjects make others uneasy, suffering a -2 penalty on Social actions. Hypatian users treat Humanity as one dot lower for their clan bane.

name: Swimmer's Skin
description: Moves at full speed in the water without movement penalties.
roll info: Reflexive Dexterity + Athletics roll to triple swim speed.

name: Recruitment Tactics
description: Sways others with deep, unshakeable belief in being correct.
roll info: Add Blood Potency as successes to a single live, interactive social roll.
drawback: Inflicts -2 on Social rolls with the specified group for a week.

name: The Spanos Method
description: Helps Kindred self-actualize by teaching them to avoid banes.
prerequisites: Deucalion or Carthian Status, Kindred Banes Specialty in Occult or Medicine.
roll info: Presence + Expression to give a pep talk; subject gains WP for avoiding their bane.
drawback: Succeed or fail, your character cannot attempt this speech more than once per night on the same vampire.

name: Zagovny
description: Backs up witchy mystique with ritual offerings to boost powers.
prerequisites: Vedma, Magic Specialty in Subterfuge, Auspex, Obfuscate.
roll info: Gain exceptional success on 3 successes for Social cold reading; summon an illusory familiar.

name: Al-Bahth
description: Extends senses through the land to steal secrets.
roll info: Add Merit dots to actions aiding Aspirations via the environment. Gain rumors or specific intel.
drawback: Disrespect the land and it will punish you. A failure on this action is a dramatic failure.

name: Vinification
description: Bottles and stores Vitae past its usual expiration date.
roll info: None
drawback: Requires Status 4 or higher in the family business, otherwise costs a full dot of Resources per month.

name: Blood of the Land
description: Instinct for tracking down intruders on protected family land.
roll info: None

name: Double Vision
description: Uses the Ka as an extra set of eyes.
roll info: Perception and Defense suffer a -2 modifier while sharing senses.
drawback: Perception and Defense suffer a -2 modifier while sharing senses. Furthermore, the Ka will always ask for a favor in return.

name: Featherweight
description: Leaves no footprints or fingerprints, slipping through the world.
roll info: Actions to track or investigate via indirect clues suffer a 3-die penalty.

name: Twisted Shadow
description: Swaps Celerity or Obfuscate for a different physical Discipline.
prerequisites: Mekhet, not part of a bloodline.
roll info: Taste of Blood rolls to identify clan suffer a -2 modifier.
drawback: When she spends Vitae to use this Discipline, treat your character's Humanity as one dot lower for the Tenebrous Curse for the rest of the scene.

name: Unobtrusive
description: The character stays beneath people's notice.
prerequisites: Mekhet or ghoul with Mekhet regnant.
roll info: Use a task-appropriate Skill instead of Stealth to remain unnoticed.

name: Speed of Thought
description: Applies supernatural speed to thought processes.
roll info: Reduce required successes on extended Mental actions by Merit dots.
drawback: Treat any failure on any action benefiting from this Merit as a dramatic failure.

name: Masquer
description: Adopts an additional Mask to stave off boredom or blend in.
roll info: None
drawback: With age, your character loses the qualities that make her unique, suffering half Blood Potency (round up) as a penalty on establishing lasting impressions with strangers.

name: Holistic Detective
description: Draws on wide breadth of knowledge to aid investigations.
roll info: Treat successful Investigation rolls related to the Specialty as exceptional successes.

name: Haven Occultation
description: Extends tenebrous nature to hiding the haven.
prerequisites: Mekhet or Shadow Cult, Safe Place 1.
roll info: Intruders suffer a penalty equal to Stealth dots to locate or navigate the haven.

name: Doll Face
description: Leaves an immaculate, fresh corpse that is unnervingly beautiful.
roll info: +2 or +3 on Socialize rolls with mortals; heals bashing damage for free in sleep.

name: Conspiracy Savant
description: Discerns patterns in random info to extrapolate evidence.
roll info: Apply the Advanced Action quality on an Uncover the Clue roll.

name: Aporia
description: Feigns doubt to lower a mark's defenses.
roll info: Ignore failure on Social maneuver roll and take no penalty on the next.
drawback: If the maneuver is successful, this tactic won't work on the same person again.

name: All-Seeing
description: Concentrates on surroundings to visualize what cannot be directly observed.
roll info: Instant Perception roll; imposes Wits as a penalty on surprise attacks/Stealth against her.

name: Altar
description: Attuned to a bloody altar enabling group rituals.
roll info: Allows teamwork rules for Cruac rituals.
drawback: Three or more characters must purchase this Merit to gain its benefits.

name: Anointed
description: Wields Longinus' word like a firebrand to rapture listeners.
roll info: Presence + Expression when preaching; listeners gain the Raptured Condition.
drawback: The character may not use this Merit on herself.

name: Atrocious
description: The monstrous Beast dominates the personality, making threats ring true.
prerequisites: Cannot have the Cutthroat or Enticing Merits.
roll info: Rolls to invoke the monstrous Beast gain the 8-again quality.
drawback: Your character does not get the 10-again quality on any rolls to invoke or resist the seductive or competitive Beasts.

name: Attaché
description: Loyal retainers granting access to specific social Merits.
roll info: Retainer gains Contacts, Resources, or Safe Place equal to Invictus Status.
drawback: Must access these Merits through an intermediary, taking time or navigating red tape.

name: Bloodhound
description: Discerns the intricacies of blood merely by smelling it.
roll info: None.

name: Cacophony Savvy
description: Adept with the codes and cants of the Kindred underground.
roll info: Intelligence + Streetwise to read signs; Wits + Politics to ask Storyteller questions about the city.
drawback: If your character does not regularly contribute news and gossip, she falls out of touch and must add something of value to reactivate it.

name: Carthian Pull
description: Leverages connections to gain temporary advantages.
roll info: Access dots of Allies, Contacts, Haven, and Herd equal to Status.
drawback: These Merits are temporary. Each use is a favor, and the Movement expects members to repay their favors.

name: Claws of the Unholy
description: Unnatural Protean claws ignore armor and deal aggravated damage.
roll info: Weapon modifier becomes +0 aggravated, ignores armor.
drawback: May only use Claws of the Unholy while in frenzy or riding the wave. Once purchased, this modification is not optional.

name: Close Family
description: Maintains deep connections to mortal blood relatives.
roll info: Intelligence + Composure (with blood sympathy bonus) to sense relative's mood and distance.
drawback: Any time you succeed on a blood sympathy roll, your character loses the ability to spend Willpower for bonus dice for the remainder of the scene.

name: Cutthroat
description: The competitive Beast dominates, forcing submission.
prerequisites: Cannot have the Atrocious or Enticing Merits.
roll info: Rolls to invoke the competitive Beast gain the 8-again quality.
drawback: Your character does not get the 10-again quality on any rolls to invoke or resist the monstrous or seductive Beasts.

name: Distinguished Palate
description: Discerns subtle nuances in blood easily.
roll info: Taste of Blood roll is an exceptional success on a single success.
drawback: Must choose a preferred feature comprising no more than one-tenth of the population. Ignore the first point of Vitae ingested from other sources in a scene.

name: Dream Visions
description: Mekhet blood touches a universal interconnectedness for prophetic dreams.
roll info: Blood Potency roll to ask a yes/no/maybe question once per night.
drawback: May only be used once per person (on first meeting) and once per night.

name: Dynasty Membership
description: Claims membership to a long-standing dynasty of Kindred.
roll info: Add senior member's Clan Status to Social dice pools; command tasks from dynasty members.
drawback: You must make your association known to take advantage of this Merit. The dynasty must have at least three members.

name: Enticing
description: The seductive Beast oozes ease and tantalizes imaginations.
prerequisites: Cannot have the Atrocious or Cutthroat Merits.
roll info: Rolls to invoke the seductive Beast gain the 8-again quality.
drawback: Your character does not get the 10-again quality on any rolls to invoke or resist the monstrous or competitive Beasts.

name: Feeding Grounds
description: Reflects the ease of hunting in a claimed territory.
roll info: Add rating to hunting rolls, starting Vitae rolls, and predatory aura conflicts in territory.
drawback: Territory doesn't maintain itself. Trespassers must not go uncontested, or your hold on the area falters.

name: Friends in High Places
description: Leverages the connections of other Invictus members.
roll info: Automatically open a number of Doors equal to status dots each month.
drawback: Your character now owes a favor to the Invictus member whose influence was drawn upon.

name: Haven
description: A safe home that protects against the sun's intrusion.
roll info: Add dots to Humanity to notice danger asleep, or Stamina + Resolve to stay awake.
drawback: Losing a Haven is a breaking point at Humanity 8, minus its dot rating. A Haven must be tied to a Safe Place Merit.

name: Herd
description: Cultivates cliques of mortals willing and eager for the Kiss.
roll info: Draw Vitae equal to twice the rating each week without rolling.
drawback: Your character must have at least minor interactions with her Herd before they'll give blood freely.

name: Honey Trap
description: The vampire's blood invigorates those who taste it.
roll info: Victim regains a point of Willpower.

name: Invested
description: Rewards from the Invictus in the form of distributed Merits.
roll info: Divide dots equal to Invictus status in Herd, Mentor, Resources, and Retainers.
drawback: These advantages are a matter of covenant scrutiny. Rivals may call whether your character deserves them into question.

name: Kindred Status
description: Standing, membership, and authority in City, Clan, or Covenant.
roll info: Apply to Social rolls with subjects over whom you have authority.
drawback: Status requires upkeep and often regular duties. If these duties are not upheld, Status may be lost.

name: Kiss of the Succubus
description: The Daeva's bite is addicting, creating lustful devotion.
roll info: Causes Addicted and Swooning Conditions in mortals.
drawback: This gift is a double-edged sword. Blood dolls won't stay away.

name: Lineage
description: Calls upon an iconic sire's reputation.
roll info: Substitute one dot of Allies, Contacts, Mentor, Resources, or Status of the sire.
drawback: Calling on your sire's reputation taxes his social capital. He may ask for repayment.

name: Lorekeeper
description: Attracts mortals interested in ancient secrets to the Sanctified library.
roll info: Grants Retainers and Herd dots when buying the Library Merit.
drawback: The vampire must be willing to let slip at least some forbidden information to her mortal retinue to maintain these advantages.

name: The Mother-Daughter Bond
description: Strong tribulation ties forming mentorships in the Circle of the Crone.
roll info: The Mentor Merit is protected by True Friend.
drawback: The mentor is likely to have stronger requirements, take substantial time, and demand loyalty.

name: Night Doctor Surgery
description: Morbid reconstruction techniques to heal Kindred.
roll info: Intelligence + Medicine to convert damage types.

name: Speaker for the Silent
description: Channels the minds of torpid dynasty members.
roll info: Acts as a medium; torpid mind controls body but retains no Disciplines.

name: Swarm Form
description: Transforms into a swarm of creatures using Protean.
roll info: None.

name: Unnatural Affinity
description: Allows the vampire to take nourishment from strange supernatural creatures.
roll info: None.
drawback: Does not inherently mean the character is (more) able to feed from the chosen subject; they can be difficult or dangerous.

name: Secret Society Junkie
description: Draws members of mortal secret societies towards the Dragon.
roll info: Gain Herd dots when taking Status or Mystery Cult Initiation in non-Kindred organizations.

name: Sworn
description: Sworn to serve one of the branches of the Ordo Dracul.
roll info: Gain dots equal to Status to split between Mentor and Retainer.

name: I Know a Guy
description: The Carthian covenant acts as a support network for Allies.
roll info: Access temporary Retainer dots equal to Allies once per story.

name: Touchstone
description: Allows the vampire to maintain multiple mortal Touchstones.
roll info: None.
drawback: Losing attachment with Touchstones will speed the loss of Humanity. If your character's last Touchstone dies, your character will feel the call of torpor.

name: Undead Menses
description: Produces viscous, dark blood with mystical significance.
roll info: Grants 8-again on Cruac rituals; inflicts Blood Potency penalty to target's Resistance against Disciplines.
drawback: The character must identify as female. Drawing forth multiple times in an evening causes aggravated damage. Rolls to identify by menstrual blood gain +5.

name: Lex Terrae
description: Makes blood poached from territory tainted.
roll info: Poacher violently retches, taking bashing damage per Vitae lost.
drawback: This Merit requires a clearly-defined and publicly announced feeding ground.

name: Mandate from the Masses
description: Harnesses populism to crush an elite's blood potency.
roll info: Manipulation + Expression vs Resolve + Blood Potency; success strips Blood Potency and caps Vitae.
drawback: The Willpower dot and Blood Potency only come back if the victim flees the city or meets Final Death.

name: Right of Return
description: Allows a Carthian to work within another covenant.
roll info: Treat impressions as one step better in Social Maneuvering.
drawback: Your character loses the 10-again quality on rolls to hide suspicious behavior from members of her other covenants.

name: Strength of Resolution
description: Stands resolute against coercion that violates the law.
roll info: Add Carthian Status to contest powers coaxing violation of city law.

name: Plausible Deniability
description: Throws law to the wind and laughs it off.
roll info: Supernatural powers fail to prove guilt; mundane detection suffers Carthian Status as penalty.
drawback: You lose the ability to use your City Status and Carthian Status dots in any Social rolls against anyone who knows for certain of your character's guilt.

name: Notary
description: Officiates Oaths as a scholar of Invictus agreements.
roll info: Invictus cannot use Status in rolls against the Notary.

name: Oath of Action
description: Swears to perform a difficult task for a liege in exchange for a Discipline.
roll info: None.

name: Oath of Fealty
description: A basic oath establishing trust and Vitae sharing over distance.
roll info: None.

name: Oath of Penance
description: Apologizes by granting the liege every tenth Vitae ingested.
roll info: None.

name: Oath of Serfdom
description: Contract granting territory and physical Disciplines to a vassal.
roll info: Vassal instinctively detects trespassing predators.

name: Kindred Dueling
description: Specific tricks to kill or disable vampires efficiently.
roll info: Hamstring denies Physical Intensity; Taunt trades attack dice to force a frenzy check.

name: Riding the Wave
description: Maintains peak efficiency while surfing the Beast.
roll info: 8-again to ride the wave, +3 bonus to actions in the zone.

name: Animal Grace
description: Dodges and strikes fluidly as an animal.
roll info: When spending Willpower, gain +2 to Defense and +3 to attack.

name: Taste of Shadow
description: Hears the shadow whispering secrets of the Blood.
roll info: Wits + Occult to learn secrets or suffer perception penalty.

name: Taste of the Serpent
description: A living vessel of indulgence enabling others.
roll info: Helping a human fulfill their Vice inflicts Swooning towards the ghoul.

name: Taste of the Wild
description: Grooms an animal pack using Vitae.
roll info: Creates bound ghoul animals after three tastes.

name: Taste of Gold
description: The best of the best, constantly proving worth.
roll info: Beating someone in competition acts as a second Vice.

name: Producer
description: Produces extra blood volume when fed upon.
roll info: Kindred gain two Vitae for every point of lethal damage.

name: Weakened Bond
description: Hard to bond due to strong will or purity.
roll info: Treat blood bond as one step lower for Willpower expenditures and social rolls.

name: Clear-Sighted
description: Sees through supernatural lies and illusions.
roll info: Spend a Willpower point to ignore Obfuscate and Nightmare for a scene.
drawback: Seeing the truth in a way no other person does may lead to breaking points. If you are ghouled or embraced, the gift vanishes.

name: Source Sympathy
description: Feels bonds of blood akin to a Kindred.
roll info: Experiences blood sympathy as if thrice removed from regnant.

name: Protected
description: The regnant senses danger to the ghoul and arrives quickly.
roll info: Regnant spends a Willpower to coincidentally arrive and save the character.

name: Empowered to Speak
description: Acts as an official mouthpiece for a regnant.
roll info: Act with the regnant's City Status when speaking on their behalf.

name: Vitae Hound
description: Can hunt Vitae by scent much like a vampire.
roll info: Add one half of Regnant's Blood Potency to tracking rolls by smell.

name: Beast Whispers
description: Soothes a vampire lost to frenzy, or borrows their Auspex.
roll info: Borrow Regnant's Auspex during the day.
